claims.claim: The telemetry and sensory websocket lanes are the structural basis for Astrid/Minime shared-space synchronization.
Mode packing near 0.33 and pressure risk near 0.23 should be legible as pressure/porosity dead-zone risk while keeping local control off without approval.
High spectral entropy can degrade reciprocity before the existing 90s high-entropy reflective stale window expires, so a non-live contraction preview should be visible.
Dynamic stale-window retunes and automatic local-control porosity intervention would alter live bridge/control behavior and require explicit operator approval.
